label: Transparent Fennec Fox motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Fennec Fox transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated fennec fox motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A fennec fox with oversized triangular ears, delicate desert-adapted face, sand-cream fur, warm amber eyes, pale ivory ear interiors, tiny dark nose, subtle dusk amber rim tones, accurate anatomy, crisp silhouette edges, and natural short-fur texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show head, ears, upper body, tail curve hint if natural, and full ear shapes without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves sand cream fur, amber eye accents, ivory ear interior, and soft desert dusk warmth.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 removable chroma-key background for transparency removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges and generous padding. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no landscape, no cactus, no extra animals, no human, no collar, no props, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no text, no watermark.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Create one high-resolution wide 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Fennec Fox" / "Fennec Fox", source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn theme.

Motif source: fennec fox ears, sand-cream fur, amber eyes, Sahara desert dusk light, light desert system.

Canvas and layout: 3840x2160 target, crisp UI-design presentation, one complete board with clear sections and readable labels. Use a refined product-design-system board, not a marketing landing page. Keep all text large enough to read in gallery preview.

Palette: dune cream, warm sand, ivory ear interior, dusk amber, amber eye gold, date-palm olive, cool oasis teal, fox-nose umber, desert-night ink. Keep a balanced desert palette, not a one-note beige sheet.

Include: palette swatches with names and hex-like labels, typography with English and Japanese guidance (Geist / Noto Sans JP style notes), component states, buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command/search, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metrics, data charts, calendar/list widgets, forms, empty/error/loading states, texture samples, icon buttons, spacing scale, radius tokens, border tokens, shadow tokens, and sample usage screens.

Visual language: ear-arc panels, compact desert field controls, amber focus rings, sand-grain texture, fine fur edge dividers, subtle triangular ear geometry, ivory surfaces, warm amber actions, olive/teal secondary signals, restrained professional SaaS dashboard density.

Constraints: no purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no stock-photo scene, no random brands, no unreadably tiny token tables, no misspellings, no extra animals, no cartoon mascot.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Create one high-resolution wide 16:9 comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Fennec Fox" / "Fennec Fox", translated from the same motif and light desert system.

Motif source: fennec fox ears, sand-cream fur, amber eyes, Sahara desert dusk light, light desert system adapted into dark desert-night mode.

Canvas and layout: 3840x2160 target, crisp UI-design presentation, one complete board with clear sections and readable labels. Use a refined product-design-system board, not a marketing landing page. Keep all text large enough to read in gallery preview.

Dark palette: desert-night ink, warm umber panels, moonlit sand foreground, ivory ear interior, dusk amber primary, amber eye gold, date-palm olive, cool oasis teal, muted dune borders. Keep it warm, legible, and connected to the light system.

Include: palette swatches with names and hex-like labels, typography with English and Japanese guidance (Geist / Noto Sans JP style notes), component states, buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command/search, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metrics, data charts, calendar/list widgets, forms, empty/error/loading states, texture samples, icon buttons, spacing scale, radius tokens, border tokens, shadow tokens, and sample usage screens.

Visual language: ear-arc panels, compact desert field controls, amber focus rings, sand-grain texture, fine fur edge dividers, subtle triangular ear geometry, warm umber surfaces, amber actions, olive/teal secondary signals, restrained professional SaaS dashboard density.

Constraints: no neon palette, no purple gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no stock-photo scene, no random brands, no unreadably tiny token tables, no misspellings, no extra animals, no cartoon mascot.
